detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use pciepsu driver.

sect1.title: xpciepsu_rc_enumerate_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XPciepsu driver. This example shows the usage of the driver APIs.

sect1.title: xpciepsu_ingress_ep_enable_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XPciePsu driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as an endpoint for Ingress data transfer.

sect1.title: xpciepsu_egress_ep_enable_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XPciePsu driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as an endpoint for Egress data transfer.
Pciepsu Endpoint and Rootport Drivers support both R5 and a53 cortex processors for xpciepsu_rc_enumerate_example.c, xaxipcie_ingress_ep_enable_example.c, xpciepsu_egress_ep_enable_example.c.
